chunks.content:
# I06 - Update Tariff Information During Transaction

| No. | Type         | Description                                                           |
| --- | ------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1   | Name         | Update Tariff Information During Transaction                          |
| 2   | ID           | I06                                                                   |
| 3   | Objective(s) | To show an EV Driver updated tariff information during a transaction. |

metadata.heading: I06 - Update Tariff Information During Transaction
metadata.heading_path: I06 - Update Tariff Information During Transaction

chunks.content:
# I06 - Update Tariff Information During Transaction - Requirements

| ID.       | Precondition                                                                                      | Requirements                                                                                                                                                           |
| --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| I06.FR.01 | When the CSMS receives a TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Updated) from the Charging Station. | The CSMS SHALL check if there is updated tariff information available.                                                                                                 |
| I06.FR.02 | I06.FR.01 AND When there is updated tariff information available.                                 | The CSMS SHALL respond with a TransactionEventResponse message to the Charging Station, containing the updated tariff information in the updatedPersonalMessage field. |
| I06.FR.03 | I06.FR.02                                                                                         | The Charging Station SHALL display the updated tariff information to the EV Driver.                                                                                    |

metadata.heading: I06 - Update Tariff Information During Transaction - Requirements
metadata.heading_path: I06 - Update Tariff Information During Transaction - Requirements
